author: Nguyễn Văn Duy
description: A preserve-first, channel-aware server reconciler for a personal Red-DiscordBot server. It audits existing structure, creates only missing resources, diagnoses role hierarchy and effective permissions, and preserves custom role/member overwrites outside the blueprint ownership boundary.
short: Audit, reconcile, harden, optimize, and launch a Discord server.
install_msg: ImperialSetup installed. Run `[p]deche diagnose`, `[p]deche audit`, and `[p]deche plan`. Review the reports before `[p]deche reconcile CONFIRM` or `[p]deche auto CONFIRM`. The bot does not need Administrator, but its role must be above roles it manages.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store end-user data. It reads guild structure and permissions only while commands are running.
